title: Harden the enterprise multi-project portfolio
acceptance: An explicit manifest aggregates up to 64 projects in declared order without discovery and isolates unavailable roots.
A lightweight bounded summary reports active workflows, blockers, risks, budgets, dependencies and releases and computes useful health.
Full detail is loaded lazily, retained in a bounded observable LRU and disposed when the server closes.
The compact portfolio status CLI returns stable JSON, terminates immediately and reveals no token or absolute project path.
The web UI preserves project attribution during delayed navigation, supports URL history and has correct English/Italian accessible structure.
Filesystem directory identities are exact above 2^53 and portable across Node.js 18, 20 and 24.
All targeted, full-suite, static and performance checks pass before push and merge.
